description_long: This is a large, rectangular storage cabinet with a flat, light beige surface and a robust, modern design. The front features a set of five drawers in the center, flanked by two larger compartments on either side, each with visible handles for easy access. The cabinet stands on sturdy, dark-colored legs that provide stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The top surface is expansive and smooth, suitable for placing items or working on. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, with metal handles and legs for durability.
description: A large, modern beige storage cabinet with central drawers, side compartments, and sturdy dark legs. The flat top and visible handles highlight its practical, robust design.
description_view_0: The front view shows five central drawers with handles and two side compartments, all with visible handles, and sturdy dark legs.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, solid beige panel with one dark leg visible at the front.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a featureless, flat beige panel with no handles or openings, and small feet at the corners.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain beige panel and a single dark leg at the front.
